title: Provide access management to account settings

posts.author: Pask (Pask)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi monday team,

As discussed in this post, I think it would be a good idea to add some level of access management to the account settings view.

By (your) definition, account settings represent global settings that impact the entire account. Thus, it begs the question why a user with read-only access to a board can open the account settings view of an app from the item view.

I would like to request the ability to hide the access to the account settings view from non-administrator users. I do not have a specific methodology in mind (it could be permissions, it could be a configuration in the feature, etc.).

Thank you
